## Summary

<!-- One-line description of what changed -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — new site capability or structure change
- [ ] `fix` — correction or bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation-only update
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance or repo hygiene
- [ ] `content` — blog, project log, or other content update

## Context

<!-- Why is this change needed? -->

## Assumptions / Open Questions

<!-- Document assumptions, uncertainties, or write `None`. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are small, focused, and reversible
- [ ] `hugo` was run locally, or `Not run` is explained below
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal-only values were committed
- [ ] `public/` is still untracked
- [ ] `themes/PaperMod` was not edited directly
- [ ] Branch naming follows the repo convention
- [ ] PR targets `main`
- [ ] Commit messages follow `type: short summary`
- [ ] Squash merge is the intended merge method

## Deploy / Domain Impact

<!-- Note any impact to GitHub Pages, CNAME, workflows, baseURL, or write `N/A`. -->

## Testing / Validation

<!-- List the checks you ran. Write `Not run` with a reason if no automated checks apply. -->
